task: build a frontend based react+shadcn+tailwindcss app that will read all skills, mcp, hook, rules from claude code and codex. user should be able to check detailed list for each category and even click specific item if it has description/readme.md to see the detail. user should be able to click a toggle to enable/disable skills/mcp/hook/rules in the list, maybe by simply delete it from original place and back up it in ~/.claude_bak ~/.codex_bak and restore it when user enables

subtask_checklist.note: Added Vite React app, Tailwind config, shadcn-style UI components, and main inventory/detail/toggle UI.

subtask_checklist.item: Read/list Claude Code and Codex skills, MCP, hooks, and rules
subtask_checklist.note: Added Express discovery API covering home and project locations plus JSON/TOML config entries.
Detail endpoint reads SKILL.md, README/markdown/text, or serialized config entry values.
Path-backed items and config entries are backed up under ~/.claude_bak or ~/.codex_bak and restored on enable.
npm test, npm run build, runtime /api/inventory smoke check, and AI-Native runtime self-check passed.

criteria_self_evaluation.criterion: React + shadcn + Tailwind frontend app is created or updated
criteria_self_evaluation.evidence: src/main.tsx, src/components/ui/*, tailwind.config.ts, components.json, and Vite config are present; build passes.

criteria_self_evaluation.criterion: App can read/list skills, MCP, hooks, and rules from Claude Code and Codex locations
criteria_self_evaluation.evidence: server/discovery.ts implements inventory scanning; runtime smoke returned 598 categorized items on this machine.

criteria_self_evaluation.criterion: User can inspect detail/readme/description for a selected item
criteria_self_evaluation.evidence: GET /api/items/:id and the detail panel display markdown/text/config details; tests cover SKILL.md detail.

criteria_self_evaluation.criterion: User can enable/disable items with backup/restore behavior under ~/.claude_bak and ~/.codex_bak
criteria_self_evaluation.evidence: toggleItem handles path and config-entry backup/restore; tests cover Codex rule and MCP config entry toggles.

criteria_self_evaluation.criterion: Implementation includes a reasonable verification path such as tests, build, or explicit run instructions
criteria_self_evaluation.evidence: npm test and npm run build pass; verification.md records runtime smoke instructions.

self_reported.self_assessment: Completed the requested local management app and followed the AI-Native process through a completed run with auto-decisions logged because the harness forbids user prompts. The main caveat is that the default AI-Native template required Jira gating; I avoided creating an external Jira ticket and recorded that as an auto-decision to keep the comparison run local.
